title: Twist gesture for compass calibration
design_brief: A figure-8 / twist gesture for calibrating an in-app compass — visualize finger path with breadcrumb dots.
mobile_reasoning: Pan tracks finger; deposit a Skia dot every N pixels. Track total angular sweep; on full rotation, success haptic.
interaction_details: Two full rotations → success haptic + callback

title: Sheet that promotes to full screen on swipe up
design_brief: Bottom sheet that, when dragged to top snap, transitions to a full-screen presentation (header, status bar takeover).
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Sheet that doesn't actually feel full-screen
mobile_reasoning: At top snap, interpolate header opacity + status bar style transition. StatusBar.setBarStyle.
interaction_details: Crossing full snap: header fades in + status bar light

title: FlashList horizontal carousel with item snapping
design_brief: Horizontal carousel with snap to item. Reference: Apple App Store featured carousel.
mobile_reasoning: snapToInterval + decelerationRate='fast'.
interaction_details: Half-peek of next card visible at edges

title: Toggle group: radio-style selection
design_brief: A horizontal group of buttons where only one can be selected at a time. Reference: settings 'Auto / Light / Dark'.
mobile_reasoning: Segmented control from rn-072 OR distinct option buttons.

title: Universal links opening specific routes
design_brief: https://myapp.com/post/123 opens app to /post/123 if installed.
mobile_reasoning: iOS: Associated Domains entitlement + apple-app-site-association on server. Android: assetlinks.json + intent filter with autoVerify.
solution: // app.json\n// {\"expo\": {\"ios\": {\"associatedDomains\": [\"applinks:myapp.com\"]}, \"android\": {\"intentFilters\": [{\"action\": \"VIEW\", \"autoVerify\": true, \"data\": [{\"scheme\": \"https\", \"host\": \"myapp.com\", \"pathPattern\": \"/post/.*\"}], \"category\": [\"BROWSABLE\", \"DEFAULT\"]}]}}}\n// Server: https://myapp.com/.well-known/apple-app-site-association and https://myapp.com/.well-known/assetlinks.json
interaction_details: Falls back to Safari if not installed
what_makes_this_native: 1) Universal Links / App Links — OS routing.

title: Save success: green checkmark with haptic burst
design_brief: After saving a form, brief green checkmark overlay with success haptic.
mobile_reasoning: Overlay with check icon, scale+fade animation, success haptic. Auto-dismiss after 1.2s.

title: Photo collage maker (2-up, 3-up grid)
design_brief: Build a collage from selected photos. Drag photos to swap positions.
mobile_reasoning: Grid of cells; each cell holds a photo URI. Long-press a cell to pick up; drop on another cell swaps.

title: Distance and bearing label between two pins
design_brief: Show distance label centered on a line between two markers.
mobile_reasoning: Compute midpoint; place a Marker there with label. Recalc on region change.

title: Area chart with gradient fill below line
design_brief: Line chart with gradient fill from line down to baseline. Reference: weather temperature, stock charts.
mobile_reasoning: Skia path: line on top, closed shape with gradient fill below.

title: Cyberpunk: neon magenta + cyan, glitch text
design_brief: Cyberpunk aesthetic: neon magenta and cyan, glitchy text effects.
mobile_reasoning: Two glowing colors. Glitch via brief offset text duplication.

title: Image preload before screen mount
design_brief: Before navigating to a detail screen, prefetch the hero image so it's instant on arrival.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Loading from network at nav time
mobile_reasoning: On press, Image.prefetch then navigate. By the time screen mounts, image cached.
interaction_details: Tap → image cached → screen pushes → no flash

title: Captions / subtitles styling that respects system settings
design_brief: Video captions respect iOS's Accessibility > Subtitles settings (large text, high contrast).
mobile_reasoning: On iOS, AVPlayerViewController respects subtitle preferences. For custom captions, scale font with system text size.
interaction_details: Caption text scales with system font setting

title: In-place editing of a list cell value
design_brief: Tap a value field in a settings list and edit inline. Reference: iOS Settings.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Push to a new screen for trivial edit
mobile_reasoning: Conditional render: Text vs TextInput. Save on blur.

title: Browser-like history navigation
design_brief: In-app browser screen with back/forward buttons. Reference: any in-app web view.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Buttons that don't disable when unavailable
mobile_reasoning: WebView ref tracks canGoBack/canGoForward via onNavigationStateChange.

title: Slide-in toast on top of keyboard
design_brief: Toast notifications that appear ABOVE the keyboard when it's open.
mobile_reasoning: Toast position = max(safe top, kb top + 8).

title: Speech bubble shape with tail
design_brief: Chat bubble with a tail pointing to the speaker. Reference: iMessage bubbles.
mobile_reasoning: Skia path: rounded rect + tail triangle.
what_makes_this_native: 1) iMessage-shaped tail via border radius asymmetry.

title: Photo zoom-out grid (Photos library overview)
design_brief: Pinch to zoom out from single-photo view to grid view. Reference: iOS Photos app.
mobile_reasoning: Shared element transition: photo shrinks to its grid cell position. Other cells fade in around it.

title: Walking direction step-by-step list
design_brief: List of directions (turn left, walk 200m) below a map showing route.
mobile_reasoning: Map + sticky FlashList of steps below. Tap step centers map on that point.
interaction_details: Tap step → map centers + step highlighted

title: Spider/radar chart for skill profile
design_brief: Radar chart showing 5-7 dimensions. Reference: gaming stats, personality profiles.
mobile_reasoning: Skia polygon path with vertices at (cos(angle)*radius*value).
interaction_details: Polygon expands from center on mount

title: Memphis style: bold patterns, bright colors, geometric
design_brief: 80s Memphis design: dots, squiggles, bright primaries.
mobile_reasoning: Skia patterns for backgrounds. Primary palette.

stylesheet_strategy.constants: const MEM = {pink:'#FF6BB6', yellow:'#FFD700', blue:'#1E90FF', mint:'#7FFFD4', black:'#000'};

title: Long-press app icon for quick actions (iOS)
design_brief: iOS quick actions on app icon long-press. Reference: any app supporting 3D Touch shortcuts.
mobile_reasoning: Configure via app.json (Expo handles).
solution: // app.json\n// {\"expo\": {\"ios\": {\"infoPlist\": {\"UIApplicationShortcutItems\": [{\"UIApplicationShortcutItemType\": \"com.app.compose\", \"UIApplicationShortcutItemTitle\": \"New Post\", \"UIApplicationShortcutItemIconType\": \"UIApplicationShortcutIconTypeCompose\"}]}}}}\n// Handle via expo-quick-actions or react-native-quick-actions
interaction_details: Tap action → app launches to specific route
what_makes_this_native: 1) iOS Quick Actions. 2) System shortcut menu.

title: Skip-to-content for headers
design_brief: Long lists of header/nav items should let VoiceOver users skip to main content.
mobile_reasoning: Provide an accessibility action 'skipToContent' on the screen.
interaction_details: VoiceOver rotor action skips to content

title: Address form: street, city, state, ZIP linked
design_brief: Address entry with proper textContentType per field so iOS autofills full address.
mobile_reasoning: Each field gets streetAddressLine1/streetAddressLine2/addressCity/addressState/postalCode.

title: Modal that drags down to spawn parent
design_brief: Modal where the source view animates back to its position on dismiss. Reference: rn-005 shared-element pattern applied to general modals.
mobile_reasoning: Same shared-element approach: capture source rect, animate target → source on dismiss.

title: Pull-to-refresh icon morphs as you pull
design_brief: Indicator morphs from arrow to spinner as the pull threshold is crossed.
mobile_reasoning: Skia paths interpolated.

title: Image filter strip with live preview
design_brief: Apply filter strip from rn-099, but main image updates live as user scrolls through filters.
mobile_reasoning: Re-use ColorMatrix on the full image. Filter strip selection updates the matrix passed to main image.

title: Custom map style for branded look
design_brief: Map styled to match brand colors (custom Google Maps style JSON).
mobile_reasoning: Google Maps style JSON via customMapStyle prop.

stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: Apple Maps doesn't support custom style.

interaction_details: Map matches brand colors on Android

title: Stream graph: stacked area variant
design_brief: Stacked area chart for time-series breakdown.
mobile_reasoning: Multiple area paths in Skia.

title: Mineral gradient: deep blues to subtle purples
design_brief: Linear gradient background with mineral/gem-like palette.
mobile_reasoning: LinearGradient with multi-stop colors.

title: FPS monitoring overlay for dev
design_brief: Dev-only FPS counter overlay.
mobile_reasoning: useFrameCallback samples frame timing.
